summary: Lead starts M5-PLAYER-RESEARCH-001 on branch research/m5-player-research after M5-WEB-WINDOWS-DISTRIBUTABLE-001 entered main and was closed. The writer is a real gameplay_designer subagent. The task must run or document a minimal, privacy-preserving M5 player-research protocol using manual/anonymized observations only; it must not add telemetry, accounts, network collection, paid services, hidden personal-data capture, or decide formal M5 passage.

spawned_thread.responsibility: primary gameplay_designer writer for minimal M5 player research protocol and evidence

tests_run.result: Clean main was confirmed before creating branch research/m5-player-research.
Task schema valid before START checkpoint.
M5-PLAYER-RESEARCH-001 was the only dependency-ready task.

decisions: Use manual/anonymized research observations only; no telemetry, accounts, network collection, paid services, or hidden personal data.
Do not modify apps/packages or product code; allowed paths are project state/messages and PROJECT_STATUS.md only.
M5 formal passage remains a separate Human Gate even if this research passes.

risks.risk: Research wording can accidentally imply real user-data collection; keep evidence anonymized and manual unless Human Gate approves otherwise.
Any cultural or historical concern must be tagged and routed rather than resolved ad hoc.

requested_action: Run or document the minimal M5 player-research protocol and evidence, update allowed process/status files, write schema-valid REVIEW handoff, and route to qa_reviewer.
